content:
The Trickster (loses strength in structured conclusions).


✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages students to think of their learning journey as a narrative arc.
• Reinforces that different skills are useful at different stages.
• Creates strategic opportunities—students can plan when they want to take risks.

📜 4. Weekly Item Drops – Three-Tiered Unlockable Objects

📜 Each week, three limited-edition items are available, capped at a set number of claimants.

✔ Gold Tier (1 Available) – The rarest item, providing the strongest advantage.
✔ Silver Tier (2 Available) – A strong but balanced advantage.
✔ Bronze Tier (3 Available) – A minor but useful boost.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 171 (chunk 171/555)
